view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for booking volume trends is satisfied as evidenced by the analytics dashboard data.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for booking volume trends is satisfied as evidenced by the analytics dashboard data.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for booking volume trends by referencing the linked use case, which provides detailed insights into total bookings, including a monthly comparison showing a 12% increase. This directly addresses the need for daily, weekly, monthly, and year-over-year booking trends. The evidence from the dashboard confirms that the requirement is covered, as it includes specific metrics related to booking performance.
